cnbc.title: Tesla misses on revenue but beats on profit as auto margins jump
cnbc.summary: Tesla's stock has underperformed all of its megacap peers so far this year as global competition ramps up in the electric vehicle market.

cnbc.title: IBM shares drop as company beats but opts to maintain guidance
cnbc.summary: Investors have been attuned to mainframe disruption threats from artificial intelligence, but IBM posted 51% growth in Z mainframe hardware revenue.

cnbc.title: ServiceNow stock sinks 14% as subscription revenue takes hit from Iran war
cnbc.summary: The software company beat expectations for earnings and revenue as it continued to expand its artificial intelligence offerings.

cnbc.title: Virginia judge blocks redistricting referendum result that boosted Democrats' election hopes
cnbc.summary: Virginia voted by a slim margin on Tuesday to approve U.S. House district maps that could allow Democrats to flip four seats in the state this November.

cnbc.title: SK Hynix posts record first-quarter profit, in line with estimates as memory prices climb
cnbc.summary: SK Hynix posted yet another quarter of record profit and revenue, as prices for its products continue to surge amid strong AI demand.

cnbc.title: U.S. Navy Secretary John Phelan leaving Trump administration: Pentagon
cnbc.summary: Secretary of the Navy John Phelan is leaving the Trump administration "effective immediately," a spokesman for the Department of Defense said.

cnbc.title: Kevin Warsh gave his preferred way for measuring inflation. It could come back to bite him
cnbc.summary: But Bank of America economist Aditya Bhave warned Wednesday that such a recalculation might not pan out as the former Fed governor hopes.

cnbc.title: Lululemon names former Nike exec Heidi O'Neill as new CEO
cnbc.summary: Lululemon announced on Wednesday that it has chosen former Nike executive Heidi O'Neill as its new CEO, effective in September.

cnbc.title: Mortgage rates sink again, and homebuyers jump back in
cnbc.summary: Mortgage demand continues to rebound as rates move slightly lower.

cnbc.title: Trump recounts Tim Cook call to 'kiss my ass,' in stark look at White House dealmaking
cnbc.summary: Tech executives from Amazon, Apple, Google and Meta have dined with Trump and donated millions to his inauguration fund and the White House ballroom.
